blended.narrative: Whiteface is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,077 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 7" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
